abilities.name: Berserk Charge
abilities.desc: This unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced

abilities.name: Cunning Hunters
abilities.desc: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If the target is within range of an objective marker, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.

abilities.name: Chosen Companions
abilities.desc: While a CHARACTER model is leading this unit, each time a model in this unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Attached Unit
abilities.desc: If a CHARACTER unit from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to an STERNGUARD VETERAN SQUAD or VANGUARD VETERAN SQUAD, it can instead be attached to this unit.

abilities.name: Storm Shield
abilities.desc: The bearer has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Rugged Resilience
abilities.desc: Each time an attack targets this unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of this unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Morkai’s Howl
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, you can select one enemy unit within 12" of this unit (if a LIEUTENANT IN REIVER ARMOUR is leading this unit, you can select one enemy unit within 18" instead). That unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from the result if it is a PSYKER unit. If that test is failed, in addition to being Battle-shocked, that unit is Stunned until the start of your next Shooting phase. While a unit is Stunned, each time a model in that unit makes a Psychic Attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: Models in this unit have a 6+ invulnerable save. This invulnerable save is improved to 4+ against Psychic Attacks.

abilities.name: Attached Unit
abilities.desc: If a CHARACTER unit from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a REIVER SQUAD, it can instead be attached to this unit.

abilities.name: Death Totem
abilities.desc: Each time the bearer makes a melee attack, re-roll a hit roll of 1.

abilities.name: Savage Frenzy
abilities.desc: Each time an enemy unit, (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) within Engagement Range of this unit Falls Back, all that models in that enemy unit must take a Desperate Escape test. When doing so, if that enemy unit is Battle-shocked, subtract 1 from those tests.

abilities.name: Thunderous Charge
abilities.desc: Each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack with its Wolf Guard weapon, if it made a Charge move this turn, add 1 to the Damage characteristic of that attack

abilities.name: Predatory Instinct
abilities.desc: Once per turn, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of this unit, it can make a Normal move of up to D6"

abilities.name: Hunting Hounds
abilities.desc: While this unit is within 6" of one or more SPACE WOLVES CHARACTER models (excluding WULFEN models), if this unit is not Battle-shocked, models in it have an Objective Control characteristic of 1

abilities.name: Headstrong
abilities.desc: You can re-roll Charge rolls made for this unit. Each time this unit makes a Charge move, until the end of the turn, each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Attached Unit
abilities.desc: If a CHARACTER unit from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to an ASSAULT INTERCESSOR SQUAD WITH JUMP PACKS or ASSAULT SQUAD WITH JUMP PACKS, it can instead be attached to this unit.

abilities.name: Fire Discipline
abilities.desc: Each time this unit Remains Stationary, if it includes a Long Fang Pack Leader, you can select one enemy unit that is visible to that model. Until the end of the turn, each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets that enemy unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

abilities.name: Attached Unit
abilities.desc: If a CHARACTER unit from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a DEVASTATOR SQUAD, it can instead be attached to this unit.

abilities.name: Armorium Cherub
abilities.desc: Once per battle, after making a Hit roll for a model in this unit, you can change that roll to an unmodified 6.

abilities.name: Guerrilla Tactics
abilities.desc:
At the end of your opponent’s turn, if this unit is more than 6" away from all enemy models, you can remove this unit from the battlefield and place it into
Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Let Loose the Wolves
abilities.desc: At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, split this unit into two units, one containing all of it's HEADTAKERS models and one containing all of its HUNTING WOLVES models, with new Starting Strengths accordingly.

abilities.name: Headhunters
abilities.desc:
At the start of the battle, select one unit from your opponent's army to be this unit's quarry. Weapons equipped by HEADTAKERS models in this unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] and [PRECISION] abilities while targeting it's quarry. Each time this unit's quarry is destroyed, select one new enemy unit to be this unit's quarry. This ability can be used even if this unit is embarked within
a Transport

abilities.name: Hunting Hounds
abilities.desc: While this unit is within 6" of one or more friendly SPACE WOLVES CHARACTER models (excluding WULFEN models), if this unit is not Battle-shocked, HUNTING WOLVES models in it have an Objective Control characteristic of 1

abilities.name: Death Totem
abilities.desc: Each time the bearer makes a melee attack, re-roll a hit roll of 1.

abilities.name: Hammer Blow
abilities.desc: In the Fight phase, after this unit has fought, select one enemy MONSTER or VEHICLE unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the next turn, that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Let Loose the Wolves
abilities.desc: At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, split this unit into two units, one containing all of it's HEADTAKERS models and one containing all of its HUNTING WOLVES models, with new Starting Strengths accordingly.

abilities.name: Headhunters
abilities.desc:
At the start of the battle, select one unit from your opponent's army to be this unit's quarry. Weapons equipped by HEADTAKERS models in this unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] and [PRECISION] abilities while targeting it's quarry. Each time this unit's quarry is destroyed, select one new enemy unit to be this unit's quarry. This ability can be used even if this unit is embarked within
a Transport

abilities.name: Hunting Hounds
abilities.desc: While this unit is within 6" of one or more friendly SPACE WOLVES CHARACTER models (excluding WULFEN models), if this unit is not Battle-shocked, HUNTING WOLVES models in it have an Objective Control characteristic of 1
